name: avi_vantage
explanation: Avi Vantage is a load balancer whose Controller exposes Prometheus metrics under `/api/analytics/prometheus-metrics/<entity>`. The check inherits `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` but wraps every scrape in a `login()` context manager that POSTs `username`/`password` to `/login` and stores the auth cookie/CSRF token; without successful login the scrape is skipped and a CRITICAL service check is emitted. The Controller URL is also tenant-specific (different controllers per tenancy). Pattern D / E.
notes: Although username/password come from the inherited OpenMetrics/HTTP template (not declared at the top level of the Avi spec), the check code unconditionally calls `self.http.post(login_url, data={'username': ..., 'password': ...})` before scraping, so credentials are effectively mandatory.
